axis: array_store push scaling for hexa-native loops (audio-3 unblocker)
status: PARTIAL — wired but insufficient for vocal_hexa scale
trigger: ω-audio-3 vocal_hexa hung >240s on second invocation; scaling test confirmed O(N²) growth at large N + accumulation across calls

hexa_full_hexa.array_is_push_sole_owner: NEW fn — refcount<=2 check (env_define adds 1 to fresh array). Wired into array_push_inplace.
hexa_full_hexa.array_push_inplace: @no_arena annotation + sole_owner-fast-path + COW fallback. Reached via call_method dispatch line 16404 for `.push`.

runtime_c.__hexa_arena_slot_dirty: DECLARATION ONLY — static int flag added with rationale comment. NOT wired: no code sets it on push, no code checks it in hexa_val_heapify. Currently inert.
runtime_c.exec_fread_nul_safe: Cross-repo upstream: switched fgets()+strlen to fread() so child output with embedded NUL bytes is captured fully (was silently truncated). Independent of audio-3 work; landed in same diff.

vocal_hexa_pattern_2400_iter_4800_push.note: scaling at N=1000 was ~quadratic; extrapolation suggests catastrophic growth past ~2000

scaling_evidence.interpretation: Push fast-path mutates in-place but still allocates per-call; second-pass slowdown indicates slot leak across iterations (M4-fix freelist disabled means slots monotonically grow). Fix is necessary-but-insufficient for vocal_hexa-scale workloads.

remaining_work_for_full_close: wire __hexa_arena_slot_dirty: set on push inside arena frame, check before T33 Fix 4 walk in hexa_val_heapify
investigate env_set refcount churn on consecutive push (each `x.push(v)` re-binds via env_set — does this incref the slot beyond expected?)
consider array pre-sizing primitive: `array_alloc(N)` returning a fixed-size mutable buffer, avoiding realloc/COW entirely on push-to-known-size
alternative: native C builtin `audio_sin_wav(path, hz, gain, ms)` — would eliminate hexa-side push loop entirely, but moves synthesis math out of hexa (against session constraint)
decision_for_session: commit current partial work + closure JSON; defer hexa-only vocal_hexa cutover until interp scaling is solved. Other organs (breath/pipe/vocal_lf) blocked on same ceiling — do NOT extend audio-3 hexa-native variants until fix lands.
blocker_severity: MEDIUM — current python+worker path is functional and committed. hexa-only is aspirational; partial ω-interp-1 work is preserved as scaffolding for future session.
rollback_if_partial_changes_cause_regres: git revert <commit-hash>; restore prior hexa_full.hexa array_push_inplace + remove dirty flag declaration in runtime.c
